holdings.infoBox: XMMO is an equity ETF with a total of 79 individual holdings. The top holdings are Curtiss-Wright stock at 3.91%, Flex Ltd. at 3.87%, Sterling Infrastructure at 3.38%, ATI Inc. at 3.13%, and TTM Technologies at 3.11%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P MidCap Momentum ETF (XMMO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P MidCap 400 Momentum index. The fund tracks an index of S&P 400 MidCap stocks selected by momentum and weighted by market cap and momentum. XMMO was launched on Mar 3, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
